message:
fix(net): add missing NotConnected fallback in Unix stream connect

wait_for_connect() in unix/stream.rs was missing the NotConnected
error handler on driver.register() that TCP stream, unix/split, and
unix/datagram all have. When the reactor returns NotConnected during
Unix socket connection (e.g., during slab invalidation), the Unix
stream would fail with a hard error instead of falling back to a
polling loop like all other socket types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -440,7 +440,6 @@ where
             assembler: shared.assembler,
             protocol: shared.protocol,
             pending_pongs: shared.pending_pongs,
-            pending_pong_flush: shared.pending_pong_flush,
             entropy: shared.entropy,
         })
     }
